item_text:
Am not easily
disturbed by events.

Am not easily
bothered by things.

Am relaxed most
of the time.

Get caught up
in my problems.

Don't worry
about things that have already happened.

Am often in a
bad mood.

Have a low
opinion of myself.

Am often down
in the dumps.

Feel that my
life lacks direction.

Am afraid that
I will do the wrong thing.

Find it
difficult to approach others.

Am afraid to
draw attention to myself.

Am not bothered
by difficult social situations.

Am able to
stand up for myself.

Do things that
I later regret.

Am able to
control my cravings.

Don't know why
I do some of the things I do.

Never spend
more than I can afford.

Feel that I'm
unable to deal with things.

Am calm even in
tense situations.
